game.title: Luanti
game.description:
Luanti (formerly Minetest) is a near-infinite-world block sandbox game and a game engine, inspired by InfiniMiner, Minecraft, and the like.

Minetest changed its name to Luanti from update 5.10.0 (October 2024) leading to a complete rebranding of the games website and forums

The new name is a combination of the name of the programming language Lua and the Finnish word "luonti" which means "creation".

game.title: Fragile Dreams: Farewell Ruins of the Moon
game.description:
Fragile Dreams takes place after an apocalyptic event that wiped out most of mankind. Young Seto finds a note from his deceased grandfather urging him to travel to the red tower that lights up the night sky. Along the way he finds a young, silver haired girl Ren who drives him to journey through the ruined world in search of companionship.

Fragile Dreams: Farewell Ruins of the Moon is an action-adventure game with light RPG elements and a focus on exploring the often desolate surroundings. Players are tasked with navigating the empty environments while fighting ghosts and obtaining items such as sketches and short stories that reveal the last moments of the lives of those lost in the great catastrophe. Seto is guided through a third-person perspective and the flashlight is one of his most important aids. Controlled through the Wii Remote it illuminates dark surroundings to interact with the environment and is needed to solve many puzzles. It can also uncover hidden enemies and often a sound through the mini speaker provides a hint about their location.

The Nunchuck is used to walk, sneak around, and crouch. It is possible to go into a first-person perspective to get a better view of the environment. Additional weapons that can be picked up during the course of the game are sticks, an iron pipe, a bow, a hammer, a bamboo sword, and a katana.

game.title: Counter-Strike: Source
game.description:
THE NEXT INSTALLMENT OF THE WORLD'S # 1 ONLINE ACTION GAME 
 Counter-Strike: Source blends Counter-Strike's award-winning teamplay action with the advanced technology of Source™ technology. Featuring state of the art graphics, all new sounds, and introducing physics, Counter-Strike: Source is a must-have for every action gamer.

localized_description.text:
第二波世界顶级联机动作游戏 
 Counter-Strike: Source 席卷而来，凝聚最新科技的 Source™ 技术将把您领入如火如荼的 Counter-Strike 的对战世界。 精美的画面、全新的音效、逼真的效果，Counter-Strike: Source 绝对是您不容错过的超眩动作游戏。

世界第一線上動作遊戲的再次出擊 
 Counter-Strike: Source 結合了 Counter-Strike 獲得大獎肯定的團隊遊戲模式與先進的 Source™ 技術。結合最高水準的影像、全新的音聲效果與新加入的物理法則，Counter-Strike: Source 是所有動作遊戲玩家都不能錯過的遊戲。

THE NEXT INSTALLMENT OF THE WORLD'S # 1 ONLINE ACTION GAME 
 Counter-Strike: Source blends Counter-Strike's award-winning teamplay action with the advanced technology of Source™ technology. Featuring state of the art graphics, all new sounds, and introducing physics, Counter-Strike: Source is a must-have for every action gamer.

LA NUEVA ENTREGA DEL JUEGO DE ACCIÓN EN LÍNEA NÚMERO 1 EN TODO EL MUNDO 
 Counter-Strike: Source combina la intensidad de las partidas por equipos, que le valió varios premios al título original, con la avanzada tecnología de Source™. Con sus vanguardistas gráficos, nuevos sonidos y un mayor dinamismo, Counter-Strike: Source no puede faltar en la colección de ningún entusiasta de los juegos de acción.

LE NOUVEAU VOLET DU JEU D'ACTION EN LIGNE Nº 1 DANS LE MONDE 
 Counter-Strike: Source associe l'intensité du jeu d'équipe primé Counter-Strike à la technologie avancée Source™. Ses graphismes saisissants, ses nouveaux effets sonores et son modèle physique exclusif font de Counter-Strike: Source un titre incontournable pour tous les fans de jeux d'action.

DIE NÄCHSTE VERSION DES BELIEBTESTEN ONLINE-ACTION-SPIELS DER WELT 
 Counter-Strike: Source kombiniert die preisgekrönte Teamplay-Funktion von Counter-Strike mit der Spitzentechnologie von Source™. Atemberaubende Grafik sowie brandneue Sounds und Steuermöglichkeiten machen Counter-Strike: Source zu einem Muss für jeden Gamer.

A PRÓXIMA FASE DO PRINCIPAL JOGO DE ACÇÃO DO MUNDO 
 O Counter-Strike: Source combina a acção de equipa galardoada do Counter-Strike com a tecnologia avançada Valve Source™. Com gráficos topo de gama, sons totalmente novos e utilizando novas tecnologias de comportamento físico, o Counter-Strike: Source é obrigatório para qualquer jogador de acção.

世界ナンバーワンのオンラインアクションゲームの第 2 弾 
 Counter-Strike: Source には、Source™ 独自の技術を活かし、賞を獲得した Counter-Strike のチームプレイアクションが盛り込まれています。最先端のグラフィック、すべて新しいサウンドを特徴とし、物理学を応用した Counter-Strike: Source は、アクションゲーマーにはプレイ必須のゲームです。

THE NEXT INSTALLMENT OF THE WORLD'S # 1 ONLINE ACTION GAME 
 Counter-Strike: Source blends Counter-Strike's award-winning teamplay action with the advanced technology of Source™ technology. Featuring state of the art graphics, all new sounds, and introducing physics, Counter-Strike: Source is a must-have for every action gamer.

DEN NÆSTE UDGAVE AF VERDENS FØRENDE ONLINE-ACTIONSPIL 
 
Counter-Strike: Source forener Counter-Strikes prisvindende teamplay-action med den avancerede Source™-teknologi. Med ultramoderne grafik, helt nye lyde og nu også med fysik er Counter-Strike: Source absolut uundværligt for enhver action-gamer.

L'ULTIMA USCITA DEL GIOCO D'AZIONE ONLINE N. 1 AL MONDO 
 
Counter-Strike: Source abbina la premiata giocabilità a squadre all'avanzata tecnologia di Source™. Counter-Strike: Source offre una grafica di altissimo livello, audio rinnovato e introduce la fisica: si tratta di un titolo imperdibile per gli appassionati di azione.

game.title: Left 4 Dead
game.description:
From Valve (the creators of Counter-Strike, Half-Life and more) comes Left 4 Dead, a co-op action horror game for the PC and Xbox 360 that casts up to four players in an epic struggle for survival against swarming zombie hordes and terrifying mutant monsters.

Set in the immediate aftermath of the zombie apocalypse, L4D's survival co-op mode lets you blast a path through the infected in four unique “movies,” guiding your survivors across the rooftops of an abandoned metropolis, through rural ghost towns and pitch-black forests in your quest to escape a devastated Ground Zero crawling with infected enemies. Each "movie" is comprised of five large maps, and can be played by one to four human players, with an emphasis on team-based strategy and objectives.

New technology dubbed "the AI Director" is used to generate a unique gameplay experience every time you play. The Director tailors the frequency and ferocity of the zombie attacks to your performance, putting you in the middle of a fast-paced, but not overwhelming, Hollywood horror movie.

Addictive single player, co-op, and multiplayer action gameplay from the makers of Counter-Strike and Half-Life Versus Mode lets you compete four-on-four with friends, playing as a human trying to get rescued, or as a zombie boss monster that will stop at nothing to destroy them.

game.title: Black Mesa
game.description:
Run. Think. Shoot. Source. 

Black Mesa is a re-envisioning of Valve Software's seminal classic Half-Life. Gordon Freeman and his unforgettable journey through the Black Mesa Research Facility have been lovingly re-created to capture the full spirit of the original game, without 1998’s graphical limitations. This is Half-Life the way it was meant to be played! 

Expect tremendously detailed environments, old-school tough-as-nails combat, and a gripping story with memorable characters. The all-new soundtrack, voice acting, choreography and dialogue create a more expansive and immersive experience than ever before. Nostalgia has never felt so fresh! 

The Steam release of Black Mesa includes various fixes, upgrades, and new features since Black Mesa’s mod release. 

Heavily updated single player experience – The Black Mesa single player experience has greatly improved from the mod release; new visuals, new voice over, updated gameplay encounters, stability changes and more. Xen is not part of the Steam release of Black Mesa, but will included as a free update when it is ready. 
Black Mesa Multiplayer – Fight with or against your friends, in two game modes across six iconic maps from the Half-Life Deathmatch universe: Bounce, Gasworks, Lambdabunker, Stalkyard, Subtransit and Undertow. 
Custom Modding Tools – Use the same tools the developers used to create your own mods, modes and maps for Black Mesa and Black Mesa Multiplayer … 
Fully integrated Workshop – … and then share your work on the fully integrated workshop! 
Complete Steam Integration – Collect trading cards, backgrounds, emoticons, achievements, and everything else you would expect out of a Steam integrated game.

Relive Half-Life   Black Mesa  is the fan-made reimagining of Valve Software’s  Half-Life .
   
  Black Mesa: Definitive Edition  Update 1.5 brings together all the improvements to graphics and gameplay across 15 years of development to create the final version of Black Mesa. There has never been a better time to pick up the crowbar and play!
   
  Single Player Campaign  You are Gordon Freeman, a theoretical physicist at the Black Mesa Research Facility. When a routine experiment goes horribly wrong, you must fight your way through an interdimensional alien invasion, and a bloodthirsty military clean-up crew in order to save the science team... and the world!
   
  Features     A completely reimagined and refined single player campaign, including all new and expanded Xen levels 
    19 chapters of fighting through top-secret labs, running atop harsh desert landscapes, sneaking into abandoned railways, and leaping across dimensions
    Mind-Blowing graphics and effects, never before seen on the Source Engine
    Face off against an army of classic enemies, updated with new features and engaging AI
    Wield an arsenal of military hardware, scientific prototypes, and the iconic crowbar through incredibly detailed environments
    The all-new soundtrack and voice acting create a more immersive experience than ever before
    50 Fun and challenging achievements
     
  Multiplayer  Frag your friends across  10  iconic maps from the Half-Life universe, including:
    Bounce
    Gasworks
    Stalkyard
    Undertow
    Crossfire
     
  Workshop  Create your own mods, models, and maps with the  Black Mesa  Source SDK, then share it with the community on the Steam Workshop.
   
  Steamworks  Collect the full set of trading cards, backgrounds, emoticons, and achievements! Featuring Steam Cloud, Steam Workshop, closed captions in multiple languages and full controller support.

jogo eletrônico de 2020

Black Mesa is a re-envisioning of Valve Software's classic science fiction first person shooter, Half-Life. Powered by Source Engine, You will re-visit the inaugural role of Gordon Freeman and his memorable journey through the Black Mesa Research Facility. Expect detailed environments to explore, a huge cast of characters and experimental weaponry. All-new music, voice acting, choreography and added dialogue give way to a more expansive and immersive experience than ever before.

The plot of Black Mesa is almost identical to Half-Life's storyline, playable through the "Lambda Core" chapter. As in the original game, the player controls Gordon Freeman, a scientist working at the Black Mesa Research Facility. He is tasked to place a sample of a strange material into an electromagnetic instrument, using the Hazardous Environment Suit Mark IV to do so safely. However, the sample material causes a "resonance cascade", devastating the facility and creating an interdimensional rift to an alien dimension called Xen, bringing its alien creatures to Earth.

Freeman survives, finds other survivors, and makes his way to the surface with the protection of his hazard suit to get help. Upon reaching the surface, however, he finds that the facility is being cleansed of any living thing - human or alien - by armed forces. From other scientists, Freeman finds the only way to stop the alien invasion is to cross over to Xen and destroy the entity holding the portal open.

Black Mesa是屡获殊荣、由粉丝制作重获构想的戈登弗里曼的黑山基地研究所旅程的里程碑之作。意在使Half-Life 2，这个Valve Software创作的的革命性作品重获新生，并重新体验这款提升整个游戏行业的标杆之作！
        2004年，两个团队——Leakfree以及Half-Life: Source Overhaul Project，因为Valve软件公司自制的半条命：起源（Half-Life: Source）仅是展示引擎移植的作品，决定做他们自己的重制项目。当他们意识到双方都有共同的创作目标时，便毅然合并为一，称为BlackMesaDevs并开始了新的项目——即为Black Mesa Source。
        2008年，BlackMesaDevs小组发布了游戏预告视频并预定于2009年发布，但2009年将至之际，因为多方原因，团队宣布延期，发布日期另寻（此期间，因为Valve的要求，制作组去掉了游戏原名Black Mesa Source里的Source，正式命名为Black Mesa）。
        2012年9月14日，Black Mesa最初的版本——MOD版发布，发布瞬间便瘫痪了官方的下载服务器。游戏提供了从Black Mesa Inbound到Lambda Core，共十四章且8~12小时游戏流程体验。但没有Xen章节。
        2013年，Black Mesa登陆Steam青睐之光，并以当时最高的票数通过，成为第一批青睐之光游戏。
        2015年5月5日，经过近2年的移植，更新与优化。Black Meas独立版在Steam正式发售，首发版为Early Access（抢先体验），不包含最终部分Xen。独立版增加了许多新的特性，包括画面，游戏内容，细节，音效等等的升级，游戏引擎也由之前的起源2007更换为起源2009。而且开发团队BlackMesaDevs也正式改名为Crowbar Collective。
        2019年6月27日，Xen技术测试版正式开启，包含第十五章Xen的前三张地图
        2019年7月7月，官方公布最新计划，Xen部分前两章Xen以及Gonarch' Lair将于8月1日实装，而不久后（大概几周），剩余的三章Interloper，Nihilanth以及Endgame也一并推出。
        2019年8月1日，Xen以及Gonarch's Lair实装
        2019年10月1日，Interloper前半部实装
        2019年12月7日，完整测试版发布，Interloper后半部以及后续Nihilanth，Endgame实装
        2019年12月24日，完整正式版正式发布
        目前，1.0版本已于2020年3月6日（当地时间）正式上架Steam

game.title: Team Fortress 2
game.description:
One of the most popular online action games of all time, Team Fortress 2 delivers constant free updates—new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats. Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities, and lend themselves to a variety of player skills.

The Gravel War - the main setting for Team Fortress 2. A woman, by some accounts, begins acquiring the world's largest supply of Australium. Radigan Conagher finishes building a Life Extender Machine for Blutarch Mann. Saxton Hale fights and captures the last surviving Yeti. Charles Darling absconds with the panthers to put them in his new animal dungeon.

Administrator, hearing the news of her takeover of Mann Co., orders her assistant Miss Pauling to reassemble the Mercs, recovering Soldier from Hollywood, Pyro from Frontier, and Demoman from his Badlands home. Saxton Hale is released from the Millhaven Ultra Prison for Dangerous Men, held there for burning down most of Charles Darling's zoo months earlier. The Classic mercenaries arrive at New Zealand with the TF2 Medic, killing Sniper, and capturing the others. TF2 Engineer has been maintaining the Life Extender Machines of an elderly woman in 19th century attire, resembling Helen, but extremely aged. The team escapes, killing three Classic mercenaries, but are overcome by blood-sucking robots.

九种不同的兵种各自具备不同的作战能力和性格，不断更新的游戏模式、地图、装备，当然还有最重要的——头饰！

"Der größte Spaß, den Sie online erleben"  - PC Gamer
  
    Ab sofort KOSTENLOS! 
  
   Es gibt keinen Haken! Spielen Sie so viel Sie wollen, so lange Sie möchten!
    Das bestbewertete kostenlose Spiel aller Zeiten! 
  
   Als eines der beliebtesten Online-Actionspiele aller Zeiten liefert Team Fortress 2 regelmäßige, kostenlose Updates mit neuen Spielmodi, Karten, Ausrüstungen und vor allem Hüten. Neun verschiedene Klassen bieten eine breite Palette von taktischen Fähigkeiten und Persönlichkeiten, wodurch sie für verschiedenste Spielertypen geeignet sind. 
    Neu bei TF? Macht nichts! 
  
   Egal welchen Stil Sie bevorzugen oder wie erfahren Sie sind: Wir haben einen passenden Charakter für Sie. Ausführliches Training und Offline-Übungen werden Ihnen helfen, Ihre Fertigkeiten zu verbessern, bevor Sie sich in einen der zahlreichen Spielmodi von TF2 wagen, wie etwa Flaggeneroberung, Kontrollpunkte, Frachtbeförderung, Arena, King of the Hill und mehr.
    Erstellen Sie Ihren eigenen Charakter! 
  
   Es gibt hunderte Waffen, Hüte und mehr zum Sammeln, Herstellen und Handeln. Passen Sie Ihre Lieblingsklasse Ihrer Spielweise und Ihrem persönlichen Geschmack an. Sie müssen nicht bezahlen, um zu gewinnen — So gut wie alle Gegenstände aus dem Mann Co. Store können auch während des Spiels gefunden werden.

"The most fun you can have online"  - PC Gamer
  
  									  Is now FREE! 
  
  									 There’s no catch! Play as much as you want, as long as you like!
  									  The most highly-rated free game of all time! 
  
  									 One of the most popular online action games of all time, Team Fortress 2 delivers constant free updates—new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats. Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities, and lend themselves to a variety of player skills.
  									  New to TF? Don’t sweat it! 
  
  									 No matter what your style and experience, we’ve got a character for you. Detailed training and offline practice modes will help you hone your skills before jumping into one of TF2’s many game modes, including Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, King of the Hill and more.
  									  Make a character your own! 
  
  									 There are hundreds of weapons, hats and more to collect, craft, buy and trade. Tweak your favorite class to suit your gameplay style and personal taste. You don’t need to pay to win—virtually all of the items in the Mann Co. Store can also be found in-game.

game.brief:
One of the most popular online action games of all time, Team Fortress 2 delivers constant free updates—new game modes, maps, equipment and, most importantly, hats. Nine distinct classes provide a broad range of tactical abilities and personalities, and lend themselves to a variety of player skills.

The Gravel War - the main setting for Team Fortress 2. A woman, by some accounts, begins acquiring the world's largest supply of Australium. Radigan Conagher finishes building a Life Extender Machine for Blutarch Mann. Saxton Hale fights and captures the last surviving Yeti. Charles Darling absconds with the panthers to put them in his new animal dungeon.

Administrator, hearing the news of her takeover of Mann Co., orders her assistant Miss Pauling to reassemble the Mercs, recovering Soldier from Hollywood, Pyro from Frontier, and Demoman from his Badlands home. Saxton Hale is released from the Millhaven Ultra Prison for Dangerous Men, held there for burning down most of Charles Darling's zoo months earlier. The Classic mercenaries arrive at New Zealand with the TF2 Medic, killing Sniper, and capturing the others. TF2 Engineer has been maintaining the Life Extender Machines of an elderly woman in 19th century attire, resembling Helen, but extremely aged. The team escapes, killing three Classic mercenaries, but are overcome by blood-sucking robots.

game.title: Horizon Chase Turbo
game.description: Horizon Chase Turbo is a standalone homage to classic 16-bit racers that defined a generation of high-speed, frenetic arcade fun. The game ignites an instant blast of nostalgia with catchy contemporary chiptune music, split screen multiplayer and retro design with modern gameplay.

localized_description.text: Horizon Chase Turbo is a standalone homage to classic 16-bit racers that defined a generation of high-speed, frenetic arcade fun. The game ignites an instant blast of nostalgia with catchy contemporary chiptune music, split screen multiplayer and retro design with modern gameplay.
充满刺激的街机赛车游戏，受到 90 年代超级好玩、直奔主题的经典赛车游戏启发。

Horizon Chase Turbo是一款赛车游戏，灵感源自80年代和90年代的流行赛车游戏：Out Run、Top Gear (SNES)、Rush等等。它重现了经典街机游戏，你可以随心所欲地畅玩飙车。
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo提供多人分屏模式，你可与好友一起坐在沙发上通宵畅玩，回忆美好的往昔时光。
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo源于过去，但同时结合了现代元素。显著的多边形和辅助色彩审美效果造就了独特的游戏氛围。
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 在Horizon Chase Turbo中，你可以驾车穿越各种不寻常之地，欣赏日落，遭遇风雪天气和火山灰，甚至还会经历严重的沙尘暴天气。
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo有幸由经典街机赛车游戏Lotus Turbo Challenge、Top Gear (SNES)和Rush的配乐创作人Barry Leitch创作配乐。
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo是屡获殊荣的游戏“Horizon Chase World Tour”的最新版，这款备受赞
 誉的游戏曾在Metacritic上以88分的佳绩荣获“2015年度最佳游戏”。Steam Edition版本为你
 带来许多新功能和内容，让你体验老派街机赛车游戏，深深沉浸于往昔美好时光。
 
 
    
   4K分辨率画面
    令人惊艳的旧式分屏多人游戏，支持多达4位玩家
    配乐由90年代经典赛车游戏Top Gear和Lotus Turbo Challenge等的音效设计师Barry
 Leitch创作
    海量内容：12个杯赛、48座城市、109条赛道、31辆可解锁的赛车以及12种赛车升级

Horizon Chase Turbo 是一款賽車遊戲，靈感源自 80 年代和 90 年代的流行賽車遊戲：Out Run、Top Gear (SNES)、Rush 等等。它重現了經典街機遊戲，你可以隨心所欲地暢玩飆車。
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo 提供多人分屏模式，可與好友一起坐在梳化上通宵暢玩，回憶美好的往昔時光。
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo 靈感源於逝去的歲月，但同時結合了現代元素。顯著的多邊形和輔助色彩美觀效果營造出獨特的遊戲氛圍。
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 在 Horizon Chase Turbo 中，你可以駕車穿越各種不尋常之地，欣賞日落，遭遇風雪天氣和火山灰，甚至還會經歷嚴重的沙塵暴天氣。
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo 有幸由經典街機賽車遊戲 Lotus Turbo Challenge、Top Gear (SNES) 和 Rush 的配樂創作人 Barry Leitch 創作配樂。
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo是屢獲殊榮的遊戲「Horizon Chase World Tour」的最新版，這款備受
 讚譽的遊戲曾在Metacritic上以88分的佳績榮獲「2015年度最佳遊戲」。Steam Edition版本為
 你帶來許多新功能和內容，讓你體驗老派街機賽車遊戲，深深沉浸於往昔美好時光。
 
 
 
    
 
    4K解析度畫面
    令人驚豔的舊式分屏多人遊戲，支援多達4位玩家
    配樂由90年代經典賽車遊戲Top Gear和Lotus Turbo Challenge等的音效設計師Barry
 Leitch創作
    海量內容：12個賽車盃、48座城市、109條賽道、31輛可解鎖的賽車以及12種賽車升
 級

Horizon Chase Turbo is a racing game inspired by the great hits of the 80's and 90's: Out Run, Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES), Rush, among others. Each curve and each lap in Horizon Chase Turbo recreates classic arcade gameplay and offers you unbound speed limits of fun. Full throttle on and enjoy!
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo has Multiplayer Split Screen support across all game modes, to rescue the nostalgia of playing with your best friends sitting on a couch all night long. The hard time is to know who is your best friend because this one is also the one to be beaten.
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo brings back the graphics context of the 16-bit generation and creates a style that is inspired in the past without letting go of its contemporaneity. The apparent polygon and secondary color aesthetic accentuate the visual beauty of the game, resulting in a unique and harmonic atmosphere. You'll feel the retro soul of the game on a completely modern body.
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo is a race around the world. With each new cup, you'll pilot your car through extraordinary places, watching the sun setting, facing rain, snow, volcanic ashes and even severe sandstorms. Be it day or night each track takes place in beautiful postcards from across the world.
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo presents Barry Leitch, the musician behind the soundtracks of classic arcade racing games Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) and Rush. As you play the game, you'll be hypnotized by his charming tunes that complement the graphical ecstasy of each horizon.
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo is the new version of the acclaimed and multi-award winning game “Horizon Chase World Tour”, selected as “BEST OF 2015” having a Metacritic of 88. The Steam Edition brings a lot of unseen features and content that enhance the nostalgia of old-school arcade racing games.
 
 
    
   4K resolution graphics
   Amazing old-style split-screen multiplayer up to 4 players
   Music by Barry Leitch, Sound Designer in 90s racing classics such as Top Gear and Lotus Turbo Challenge, among others
   Tons of content: 12 Cups, 48 Cities, 109 tracks, 31 Unlockable Cars and 12 Upgrades

Horizon Chase Turbo es un juego de carreras inspirado en los grandes éxitos de los años 80's y 90's: Out Run, Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) y la serie Rush entre otros. Cada curva y cada vuelta en Horizon Chase Turbo recrea el gameplay de los arcades clásicos y ofrece velocidad sin límites. ¡Acelera al máximo y disfruta!
 
 
    
 
 Disfruta como nunca de un modo Multijugador a Pantalla Dividida que rescata la nostalgia de aquellas interminables tardes y noches con amigos en el sofá. Lo más complicado será saber quién es tu mejor amigo, porque también será alguien a quien tendrás que vencer.
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo lleva al jugador de vuelta a los gráficos de la generación 16-bit con un estilo inspirado en el pasado pero sin perder su modernidad. La estética poligonal y el uso de colores secundarios acentúan la belleza visual del juego, resultando en una atmósfera visual única y harmoniosa. Sentirás el alma retro del juego en un cuerpo completamente moderno. 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo es una carrera repleta de sorpresas alrededor del globo. En cada nueva copa pilotarás tu bólido a través de lugares extraordinarios, contemplarás puestas de sol, enfrentarás la lluvias intensas, feroces nevadas, violentas tormentas de ceniza y despiadadas tempestades de arena. No importa si es de noche o de día, quedarás maravillado por los paisajes dignos de postal mientras conduces por lugares de todo el mundo.
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo presenta a Barry Leitch, el compositor por detrás de las bandas sonoras de clásicos de carreras como Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) y la saga Rush. Mientras juegas estarás hipnotizado por sus encantadoras músicas que complementan perfectamente el éxtasis gráfico de cada paisaje.
 
      
 
 
 
    
 Horizon Chase Turbo es la nueva versión del aclamado y ganador de múltiples premios “Horizon Chase World Tour”, seleccionado como “LO MEJOR DE 2015” por Apple y con un Metacritic de 88. La Edición Turbo, disponible para PC/Mac/Linux, ofrece muchísimas características y contenido nuevo que aumentan la nostalgia de los clásicos de carreras de los 80s y 90s.
 
    
   Gráficos en resolución 4k
   Increíble modo multiplayer a pantalla dividida con hasta 4 jugadores
   Música a cargo de Barry Leitch, Sound Designer en los clásicos de los 90s como Top Gear y Lotus Turbo Challenge, entre otros
   Multitud de contenido: 12 Copas, 48 Ciudades, 110 Circuitos, 26 Coches Desbloqueables y 10 Actualizaciones

Horizon Chase Turbo est un jeu de course inspiré de titres populaires des années 80 et 90 tels qu’Out Run, Top Gear (SNES) et Rush. Le gameplay classique en arcade offre des courses fulgurantes et divertissantes.
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo comporte un mode multijoueur à écran partagé qui vous rappellera vos soirées à jouer entre amis sur un canapé.
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo s’inspire du passé tout en restant moderne. Les polygones et les couleurs secondaires offrent une atmosphère unique.
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Dans Horizon Chase Turbo, pilotez votre voiture dans des lieux extraordinaires sur fond de coucher de soleil, sous la pluie ou la neige, à travers des nuées de cendres volcaniques ou dans des tempêtes de sable.
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo présente Barry Leitch, le musicien ayant composé les bandes-son de jeux d’arcade classiques tels que Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) et Rush
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Découvrez Horizon Chase Turbo, la nouvelle version de Horizon Chase World Tour, le jeu
 salué par la critique et de nombreuses fois primé, sélectionné dans la catégorie
 « MEILLEUR JEU DE 2015 » avec un score de 88 sur Metacritic. La Steam Edition offre de
 nombreuses nouvelles fonctions et du contenu inédit qui vous plongeront dans la nostalgie
 des jeux de course arcade old school.
 
 
    
    Graphismes d’une résolution de 4K
    Mode multijoueur rétro avec un écran partagé pour jusqu’à 4 joueurs
    Musique composée par Barry Leitch, concepteur de son pour des jeux classiques
 des années 90 tels que notamment Top Gear et Lotus Turbo Challenge
    Énormément de contenu : 12 coupes, 48 villes, 109 circuits, 31 voitures
 déverrouillables et 12 améliorations

Horizon Chase Turbo wurde von den Hits der 80er und 90er Jahre inspiriert: Out Run, Top Gear (SNES), Rush und anderen. Es ist dem klassischen Gameplay nachempfunden und bietet rasanten Spaß.
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo hat einen Multiplayer-Splitscreen, der Erinnerungen an nächtelanges Spielen mit Freunden auf der Couch weckt.
 
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 In Horizon Chase Turbo steuerst du dein Auto durch ungewöhnliche Orte, siehst Sonnenuntergänge, Regen, Schnee, Vulkanasche und sogar schlimme Sandstürmen.
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo ist von der Vergangenheit inspiriert, ohne seine modern Seite zu verlieren. Die Polygone und die sekundäre Farbästhetik erschaffen eine einzigartige Atmosphäre.
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo präsentiert Barry Leitch, den Musiker, der für Soundtracks von klassischen Arcade-Rennspielen wie Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) und Rush verantwortlich ist.
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo ist die neue Version des beliebten und mehrfach preisgekrönten
 Spieles „Horizon Chase World Tour“, das als „BESTES SPIEL 2015“ mit einer Metacritic von
 88 ausgezeichnet wurde. In der Steam-Edition gibt es viele bisher unbekannte Features und
 Inhalte, die die Nostalgie der alten Rennspiele aufleben lassen.
 
 
    
    Grafik mit 4K-Auflösung
    Toller Split-Screen-Mehrspielermodus im alten Stil für bis zu 4 Spieler
    Musik von Barry Leitch, dem Sounddesigner der Rennklassiker der 90er Jahre, wie
 Top Gear, Lotus Turbo Challenge und vielen anderen
    Haufenweise Inhalte: 12 Pokale, 48 Städte, 109 Strecken, 31 freischaltbare Autos
 und 12 Upgrades

Horizon Chase Turbo is a racing game inspired by the great hits of the 80's and 90's: Out Run, Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES), Rush, among others. Each curve and each lap in Horizon Chase Turbo recreates classic arcade gameplay and offers you unbound speed limits of fun. Full throttle on and enjoy!
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo has Multiplayer Split Screen support across all game modes, to rescue the nostalgia of playing with your best friends sitting on a couch all night long. The hard time is to know who is your best friend because this one is also the one to be beaten.
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo brings back the graphics context of the 16-bit generation and creates a style that is inspired in the past without letting go of its contemporaneity. The apparent polygon and secondary color aesthetic accentuate the visual beauty of the game, resulting in a unique and harmonic atmosphere. You'll feel the retro soul of the game on a completely modern body.
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo is a race around the world. With each new cup, you'll pilot your car through extraordinary places, watching the sun setting, facing rain, snow, volcanic ashes and even severe sandstorms. Be it day or night each track takes place in beautiful postcards from across the world.
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo presents Barry Leitch, the musician behind the soundtracks of classic arcade racing games Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) and Rush. As you play the game, you'll be hypnotized by his charming tunes that complement the graphical ecstasy of each horizon.
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo is the new version of the acclaimed and multi-award winning game “Horizon Chase World Tour”, selected as “BEST OF 2015” having a Metacritic of 88. The Steam Edition brings a lot of unseen features and content that enhance the nostalgia of old-school arcade racing games.
 
 
    
   4K resolution graphics
   Amazing old-style split-screen multiplayer up to 4 players
   Music by Barry Leitch, Sound Designer in 90s racing classics such as Top Gear and Lotus Turbo Challenge, among others
   Tons of content: 12 Cups, 48 Cities, 109 tracks, 31 Unlockable Cars and 12 Upgrades

「Horizon Chase Turbo」は80～90年代に人気を博した「アウトラン」、「Lotus Turbo Challenge 」、「トップレーサー」（スーファミ版）、「Rush」などの影響を受けて創られたレーシングゲームです。クラシックなレーシングゲームの感触を余すところなく再現したこのゲームに、楽しさの速度制限などありません。
 
 
 
    
 
 「Horizon Chase Turbo」のマルチプレイは分割画面表示です。友達とソファに座って一晩中遊んだあの頃の楽しさをもう一度。
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 「Horizon Chase Turbo」は古きを訪ねることで別種の新しさを生み出しました。くっきりとしたポリゴンと目にも鮮やかなカラーリングが独特な雰囲気を作り出しています。
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 世界中の様々な場所を走ることができるのが「Horizon Chase Turbo」です。各地で太陽が沈むのを眺めながら、雨や雪や火山灰に打たれながら。ときには砂嵐に巻きこまれながら。
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 「Horizon Chase Turbo」の音楽はBarry Leitchが担当。「Lotus Turbo Challenge 」、「トップレーサー」（スーファミ版）、「Rush」などの名作レーシングゲームのサントラを手がけた伝説のミュージシャンです。
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 「Horizon Chase Turbo」は、批評家の評価を集め、Metacriticでは88の高得点をマークし、「BEST OF 2015」などいくつもの賞を受賞した「Horizon Chase World Tour」に続く新作です。この Steam エディションには、多くの新要素や新規コンテンツが盛り込まれています。古き良きアーケイドスタイルのレーシングゲームを存分にお楽しみください。
 
 
 
    
 
   4K 解像度のグラフィック
   オールドスタイルな分割画面によるマルチプレイ、最大4人でプレイ可能
   音楽はあの Barry Leitch、「トップレーサー」（スーファミ版）や「Lotus Turbo Challenge」などの90年代名作レースゲームを手がけたサウンドデザイナー
   山盛りのコンテンツ: 12 のカップ、48の街、109のトラック、31台ものマシン、そして12のアップグレード

Horizon Chase Turbo er et racerspil inspireret af de store hits fra 80’erne og 90’erne: Out
 Run, Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES), Rush og andre. Hvert vejsving og hver
 runde i Horizon Chase Turbo genskaber klassisk arkade-gameplay og giver dig sjov uden
 grænser. Giv den fuld gas, og hav det sjovt!
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo har multiplayer-splitskærmunderstøttelse på tværs af alle spiltilstande,
 så du kan nyde nostalgien ved at spille med dine bedste venner i sofaen hele natten. Det
 svære er at vide, hvem der er din bedste ven, for det er jo også ham eller hende, der skal
 bankes.
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo bringer 16-bit-generationens grafikkontekst tilbage og skaber en stil,
 der er inspireret af fortiden uden at give slip på nutidigheden. Polygonen og den sekundære
 farveæstetik fremhæver spillets visuelle skønhed, hvilket resulterer i en unik og harmonisk
 atmosfære. Du kan mærke retrospillets sjæl på en helt moderne krop.
 en verdenstur via fantastiske horisonter
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo er et racerløb der finder sted rundt om i verden. Med hver nye pokal
 styrer du din bil på ekstraordinære steder og ser solnedgange, regn, sne, vulkansk aske og
 endda voldsomme sandstorme. Hvad end det er dag eller nat, så finder hvert løb sted i
 smukke omgivelser.
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo præsenterer Barry Leitch, musikeren bag lydsporene på klassiske
 arkaderacerspil såsom Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) og Rush. Når du spiller
 spillet, bliver du hypnotiseret af de charmerende melodier, der supplerer den grafiske
 ekstase ved hver horisont.
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo er den nye version af det anerkendte og multi-prisbelønnede spil
 "Horizon Chase World Tour” og blev valgt som "BEST OF 2015" med en metacritic på 88.
 Steam Edition bringer en masse hidtil usete funktioner og indhold, som forbedrer de mere
 gammeldags arkadespil.
 
 
    
 
    4K-opløsning
    Fantastisk, old-school, splitskærm-multiplayer op til 4 spillere
    Musik af Barry Leitch, Sound Designer for 90'ernes racing-klassikere som fx Top
 Gear og Lotus Turbo Challenge, blandt andre
    Masser af indhold 12 pokaler, 48 ​​byer, 109 baner, 12 opgraderinger og 31 biler, der
 kan låses op

Horizon Chase Turbo è un simulatore di guida ispirato ai grandi successi anni '80 e '90, Out Run, Top Gear (SNES), Rush e altri. Ricrea la classica azione di gioco arcade e offre un divertimento senza limiti di velocità.
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo offre una modalità multigiocatore su schermo diviso per chi ha nostalgia delle partite notturne sul divano in compagnia degli amici.
 
       
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo è ispirato al passato ma non ignora il presente. L'estetica apparente di poligoni e colori secondari dà vita a un'atmosfera originale.
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 In Horizon Chase Turbo guiderai la tua vettura attraversando luoghi straordinari, ammirando tramonti, affrontando pioggia, neve, ceneri vulcaniche e violente tempeste di sabbia.
 
 
    
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo presenta Barry Leitch, l'autore delle colonne sonore dei simulatori di guida arcade Lotus Turbo Challenge, Top Gear (SNES) e Rush.
 
 
      
 
 
 
    
 
 Horizon Chase Turbo è la nuova versione dell'acclamato e pluripremiato gioco "Horizon Chase World Tour", selezionato come "BEST OF 2015" con un punteggio Metacritic di 88. L'edizione Steam presenta un sacco di caratteristiche innovative e contenuti che convogliano il senso di nostalgia dei giochi di corse automobilistiche arcade vecchio stile.
 
 
    
 
   Risoluzione grafica 4K
   Incredibile multigiocatore vecchio stile su schermo diviso per un massimo di 4 giocatori
   Musica di Barry Leitch, sound designer dei classici giochi di corse anni 90, come Top Gear, Lotus Turbo Challenge e altri
   Un sacco di contenuti: 12 coppe, 48 città, 109 piste, 31 auto sbloccabili e 12 potenziamenti

game.brief: Horizon Chase Turbo is a standalone homage to classic 16-bit racers that defined a generation of high-speed, frenetic arcade fun. The game ignites an instant blast of nostalgia with catchy contemporary chiptune music, split screen multiplayer and retro design with modern gameplay.

game.title: Wallpaper Engine
game.description:
Wallpaper Engine enables you to use live wallpapers on your Windows desktop. Various types of animated wallpapers are supported, including 3D and 2D animations, websites, videos and even certain applications. Choose an existing wallpaper or create your own and share it on the Steam Workshop! In addition to that, you can use the free Wallpaper Engine companion app for Android to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device and take your live wallpapers on the go.
 
  NEW:  Use the free Android companion app to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device.
 
  
 
   Bring your desktop wallpapers alive with realtime graphics, videos, applications or websites.
   Use animated screensavers while you are away from your computer.
   Personalize animated wallpapers with your favorite colors.
   Use interactive wallpapers that can be controlled with your mouse.
   Many aspect ratios and native resolutions supported including 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Multi monitor environments are supported.
   Wallpapers will pause while playing games to save performance.
   Create your own animated wallpapers in the Wallpaper Engine Editor.
   Animate new live wallpapers from basic images or import HTML or video files for the wallpaper.
   Use the Steam Workshop to share and download wallpapers for free.
   Wallpaper Engine can be used at the same time as any other Steam game or application.
   Supported video formats: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (for local files, Workshop only allows mp4).
   Use the free Android companion app to take your favorite scene and video wallpapers on the go.
   Support for Razer Chroma and Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine aims to deliver an entertaining experience while using as few system resources as possible. You can choose to automatically pause or completely stop the wallpaper while using another application or playing fullscreen (including borderless windowed mode) to not distract or hinder you while playing a game or working. Many options to tweak quality and performance allow you to make Wallpaper Engine fit your computer perfectly. As a general rule of thumb, 3D, 2D and video based wallpapers will perform best, while websites and applications will require more resources from your system. Having a dedicated GPU is highly recommended, but not required.     Choose from over a million free wallpapers from the Steam Workshop with new wallpapers being uploaded every day! Can't find a wallpaper that fits your mood? Let your imagination go wild by using the Wallpaper Engine Editor to create your own animated wallpapers from images, videos, websites or applications. A large selection of presets and effects allow you to animate your own images and share them on the Steam Workshop or to just use them for yourself.

Wallpaper Engine 使您可在 Windows 桌面上使用动态壁纸。它支持各种类型的动画壁纸，包括 3D 和 2D 动画、网站、视频、乃至某些应用程序。选择现有壁纸，或创建自己的壁纸并在 Steam 创意工坊上分享！此外，您还可以使用适用于 Android 的 Wallpaper Engine 免费伴侣应用程序，将您最喜爱的壁纸传输到 Android 移动设备，并随身携带动态壁纸。
 
  新功能： 使用免费的 Android 伴侣应用程序，将您最喜爱的壁纸传输到 Android 移动设备。
 
  
 
   通过实时图形、视频、应用程序或网站让您的桌面充满活力。
   在您离开计算机时使用动画屏幕保护程序。
   用您最喜欢的颜色个性化动画壁纸。

   支持多种宽高比和原始分辨率，包括 16:9、21:9、16:10、4:3。
   支持多显示器环境。
   壁纸将在玩游戏时暂停，以节省性能。
   在 Wallpaper Engine 编辑器中创建自己的动画壁纸。
   通过基本图片制作新的动态壁纸动画，或为壁纸导入 HTML 或视频文件。
   使用 Steam 创意工坊免费分享和下载壁纸。
   Wallpaper Engine 可与任何其他 Steam 游戏或应用程序同时使用。
   支持的视频格式：mp4、WebM、avi、m4v、mov、wmv（对于本地文件，创意工坊仅支持 mp4）。
   使用免费的 Android 伴侣应用程序，随身携带您最喜爱的场景和视频壁纸。
   支持 Razer Chroma 和 Corsair iCUE。  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine 旨在提供有趣的体验，同时尽可能少占用系统资源。您可以选择在使用其他应用程序或全屏播放（包括无边框窗口模式）时自动暂停或完全停止壁纸，以免在玩游戏或工作时分散注意力或受到妨碍。许多微调质量和性能的选项可使 Wallpaper Engine 完美地适合您的计算机。根据一般经验，3D、2D 和基于视频的壁纸表现最佳，而网站和应用程序需要占用您系统中更多的资源。强烈建议您使用专用 GPU，但这不是必要要求。     Steam 创意工坊中提供超过一百万张免费壁纸，而且每天都会上传新壁纸！找不到适合您心情的壁纸？通过使用 Wallpaper Engine 编辑器从图片、视频、网站或应用程序创建自己的动画壁纸，尽情发挥您的想象力。大量的预设和效果可让您为自己的图片制作动画，并在 Steam 创意工坊上分享或仅为己用。

有了 Wallpaper Engine，您可以在 Windows 桌面上使用動態桌布。支援各種類型的動態桌布，包括 3D 和 2D 動畫、網站、視訊，甚至是特定應用程式。選擇現有桌布或自己創造桌布，並且在 Steam Workshop 上與大家分享！除此之外，您可使用 Android 版 Wallpaper Engine 隨附應用程式，將您最愛的動態桌布傳輸至 Android 行動裝置，隨時隨地好好欣賞。
 
  新功能： 使用免費的Android 隨附應用程式，將您最愛的桌布傳輸至 Android 行動裝置。
 
  
 
   透過即時影像顯示、視訊、應用程式或網站，讓您的桌面活起來。
   離開電腦時開啟動態螢幕保護程式。
   用您最喜愛的顏色，個人化動態桌布。
   使用可用滑鼠控制的互動式桌布。
   支援多種外觀比例與原始解析度，包含 16:9、21:9、16:10、4:3。
   支援多顯示器環境。
   遊玩遊戲時，桌布將暫停運作，以節省效能。
   在 Wallpaper Engine 編輯器上創造您專屬的動畫桌布。
   透過基本圖像或者匯入 HTML 及視訊檔案，創造新的動態桌布。
   Steam 工作坊可分享與下載桌布。
   Wallpaper Engine 可以與任何其他 Steam 遊戲或應用程式同時使用。
   支援的視訊檔案格式：mp4、WebM、avi、m4v、mov、wmv (針對本機檔案，工作坊則僅支援 mp4 格式)。
   使用免費的 Android 隨附應用程式，將您最愛的場景和視訊桌布帶著走。
   支援 Razer Chroma 和 Corsair iCUE。  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine 旨在以最少的系統資源，帶給您最大的樂趣體驗。您使用其他應用程式或全螢幕播放 (包括無邊框視窗模式) 時，可選擇使桌布自動暫停或完全停止，避免玩遊戲或工作時分散注意力或造成干擾。多種調整品質和效能的選項，讓您的 Wallpaper Engine 完美適用於您的電腦。一般而言，以 3D、2D 和視訊為基礎的桌布表現最佳，而以網站和應用程式為基礎的桌布則需要較多的系統資源。強烈建議您使用專用 GPU，但並非必要。     每天都有新的桌布上傳，您可從 Steam 工作坊上百萬個免費桌布精挑細選！找不到符合心情的桌布？不妨使用 Wallpaper Engine 編輯器，用圖像、視訊、網站或應用程式創造自己的動畫桌布，無限釋放您的想像。大量的預設和效果可供您自行以影像製作動畫，並在 Steam 工作坊上與大家分享，自己私藏獨享也行。

Wallpaper Engine enables you to use live wallpapers on your Windows desktop. Various types of animated wallpapers are supported, including 3D and 2D animations, websites, videos and even certain applications. Choose an existing wallpaper or create your own and share it on the Steam Workshop! In addition to that, you can use the free Wallpaper Engine companion app for Android to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device and take your live wallpapers on the go.
 
  NEW:  Use the free Android companion app to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device.
 
  
 
   Bring your desktop wallpapers alive with realtime graphics, videos, applications or websites.
   Use animated screensavers while you are away from your computer.
   Personalize animated wallpapers with your favorite colors.
   Use interactive wallpapers that can be controlled with your mouse.
   Many aspect ratios and native resolutions supported including 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Multi monitor environments are supported.
   Wallpapers will pause while playing games to save performance.
   Create your own animated wallpapers in the Wallpaper Engine Editor.
   Animate new live wallpapers from basic images or import HTML or video files for the wallpaper.
   Use the Steam Workshop to share and download wallpapers for free.
   Wallpaper Engine can be used at the same time as any other Steam game or application.
   Supported video formats: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (for local files, Workshop only allows mp4).
   Use the free Android companion app to take your favorite scene and video wallpapers on the go.
   Support for Razer Chroma and Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine aims to deliver an entertaining experience while using as few system resources as possible. You can choose to automatically pause or completely stop the wallpaper while using another application or playing fullscreen (including borderless windowed mode) to not distract or hinder you while playing a game or working. Many options to tweak quality and performance allow you to make Wallpaper Engine fit your computer perfectly. As a general rule of thumb, 3D, 2D and video based wallpapers will perform best, while websites and applications will require more resources from your system. Having a dedicated GPU is highly recommended, but not required.     Choose from over a million free wallpapers from the Steam Workshop with new wallpapers being uploaded every day! Can't find a wallpaper that fits your mood? Let your imagination go wild by using the Wallpaper Engine Editor to create your own animated wallpapers from images, videos, websites or applications. A large selection of presets and effects allow you to animate your own images and share them on the Steam Workshop or to just use them for yourself.

Wallpaper Engine te permite utilizar fondos de pantalla animados en el escritorio de Windows. Es compatible con varios tipos de fondos, incluyendo animaciones 3D y 2D, páginas web, vídeos e incluso aplicaciones. Elige un fondo de pantalla ya preparado o crea el tuyo propio y compártelo en Steam Workshop. Además, puedes utilizar la aplicación gratuita de Wallpaper Engine para Android y así transferirte tus fondos de pantalla favoritos a tu dispositivo y llevártelos a todas partes.
 
  NOVEDAD:  Usa la aplicación de Android para transferirte tus fondos favoritos a un dispositivo Android.
 
  
 
   Da vida a tus fondos de escritorio con gráficos, vídeos, aplicaciones o páginas web en tiempo real.
   Usa salvapantallas animados mientras no estés en el ordenador.
   Personaliza los fondos de pantalla animados con tus colores favoritos.
   Usa fondos de pantalla interactivos que puedes controlar con el ratón.
   Es compatible con muchas relaciones de aspecto y resoluciones nativas como, por ejemplo, 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Es compatible con el uso de varios monitores.
   Los fondos de pantalla se pausarán cuando jueges para que no afecten al rendimiento.
   Crea tus propios fondos de pantalla animados con el editor de Wallpaper Engine.
   Anima fondos de pantalla a partir de imágenes básicas o importa archivos HTML o de vídeo para el fondo de pantalla.
   Usa Steam Workshop para compartir y descargar fondos de pantalla de forma gratuita.
   Puedes usar Wallpaper Engine al mismo tiempo que cualquier otro juego o aplicación de Steam.
   Formatos de vídeo compatibles: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (para archivos locales, Workshop solo admite mp4).
   Usa la aplicación gratis para Android y llévate tus fondos de pantalla de escena o de vídeo favoritos a cualquier parte.
   Compatible con Razer Chroma y Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine tiene como objetivo ofrecer una experiencia de entretenimiento empleando la menor cantidad posible de recursos del sistema. Puedes elegir poner en pausa automáticamente o detener por completo el fondo mientras utilizas otra aplicación o la pantalla completa (incluido el modo de ventana sin bordes), para no distraerte o que no te afecte mientras juegas o trabajas. Las opciones para retocar la calidad y el rendimiento a tu gusto te permiten adaptar el fondo a tu equipo a la perfección. Por lo general, los fondos 3D, 2D y de vídeo funcionan mejor, mientras que las páginas web y las aplicaciones requerirán más recursos del sistema. Es muy recomendable tener una GPU dedicada, aunque no es obligatorio.     Elige entre más de 1 000 000 de fondos gratuitos en Steam Workshop: ¡los usuarios suben fondos nuevos todos los días! ¿No encuentras el fondo perfecto para ti? Pues deja volar tu imaginación con el editor de Wallpaper Engine para crear tus propios fondos animados a partir de imágenes, vídeos, páginas web o aplicaciones. La gran selección de valores predeterminados y efectos te permitirá animar las imágenes y compartirlas en Steam Workshop o crearlas para tu uso personal.

Wallpaper Engine vous permet d'utiliser des fonds d'écran animés sur votre bureau Windows. Différents types de fonds d'écran animés sont pris en charge, notamment les animations 3D et 2D, les sites Web, les vidéos et même certaines applications. Choisissez un fond d'écran existant ou créez le vôtre, puis partagez-le sur Steam Workshop ! En outre, vous pouvez utiliser l'application gratuite Wallpaper Engine pour Android pour transférer vos fonds d'écran préférés sur votre appareil mobile Android et emporter vos fonds d'écran animés partout où vous allez.
 
  NOUVEAU :  Utilisez l'application gratuite pour Android afin de transférer vos fonds d'écran préférés sur votre appareil mobile Android.
 
  
 
   Donnez vie à vos fonds d'écran avec des graphiques, des vidéos, des applications ou des sites Web en temps réel.
   Utilisez des écrans de veille animés lorsque vous n'êtes pas devant votre ordinateur.
   Personnalisez vos fonds d'écran animés avec vos couleurs préférées.
   Utilisez des fonds d'écran interactifs que vous pouvez contrôler avec votre souris.
   De nombreux formats et résolutions natifs sont pris en charge, notamment 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Les environnements multi-moniteurs sont pris en charge.
   Les fonds d'écran se mettent en pause pendant les jeux pour économiser les performances.
   Créez vos propres fonds d'écran animés dans l'éditeur de fonds d'écran.
   Animez de nouveaux fonds d'écran à partir d'images de base, ou importez des fichiers HTML ou vidéo pour le fond d'écran.
   Utilisez Steam Workshop pour partager et télécharger gratuitement des fonds d'écran.
   Wallpaper Engine peut être utilisé en même temps que tout autre jeu ou application Steam.
   Formats vidéo pris en charge : mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (pour les fichiers locaux, le Workshop n'autorise que le mp4).
   Utilisez l'application Android gratuite pour emporter vos fonds d'écran de scènes et de vidéos préférés.
   Prise en charge de Razer Chroma et de Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine vise à offrir une expérience divertissante tout en utilisant le minimum de ressources système. Vous pouvez choisir de mettre automatiquement en pause le fond d'écran ou de l'arrêter complètement lorsque vous utilisez une autre application ou quand vous jouez en plein écran (y compris en mode fenêtré sans bordure) afin de ne pas vous distraire ou vous gêner lorsque vous jouez à un jeu ou travaillez. De nombreuses options de réglage de la qualité et des performances vous permettent d'adapter parfaitement Wallpaper Engine à votre ordinateur. En règle générale, les fonds d'écran en 3D, 2D et vidéo sont les plus performants, tandis que les sites Web et les applications exigent davantage de ressources de votre système. Il est fortement recommandé, mais pas obligatoire, d'avoir un GPU dédié.     Choisissez parmi plus d'un million de fonds d'écran gratuits dans Steam Workshop, avec de nouveaux fonds d'écran mis en ligne chaque jour ! Vous ne trouvez pas un fond d'écran qui correspond à votre humeur ? Laissez libre cours à votre imagination en utilisant l'éditeur de Wallpaper Engine pour créer vos propres fonds d'écran animés à partir d'images, de vidéos, de sites Web ou d'applications. Une large sélection de préréglages et d'effets vous permet d'animer vos propres images et de les partager sur Steam Workshop ou de les utiliser simplement pour vous-même.

Wallpaper Engine erlaubt es dir, animierte Hintergründe auf deinem Windows-Desktop zu verwenden. Es werden verschiedene Arten von animierten Hintergründen unterstützt, darunter 3D- und 2D-Animationen, Websiten, Videos und sogar eine Auswahl an Anwendungen. Wähle aus bereits existierenden Hintergründen oder erstelle deine eigenen und teile sie auf dem Steam Workshop! Außerdem kannst du die kostenlose Begleit-App von Wallpaper Engine für Android installieren und deine Lieblingshintergründe auf dein Mobilgerät übertragen und überall hin mitnehmen.
 
  NEU:  Nutze die kostenlose Begleit-App für Android und übertrage deine Lieblingshintergründe auf dein Android-Gerät.
 
  
 
   Erwecke deinen Desktop mit Hilfe von Echtzeit-Grafiken, Videos, Anwendungen oder Websiten zum Leben.
   Personalisiere animierte Hintergründe mit Farben deiner Wahl.
   Benutze interaktive Hintergründe, welche mit deiner Maus gesteuert werden können.
   Vollständige Unterstützung für alle Arten von Bildschirmverhältnissen und Auflösungen werden unterstützt, darunter 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Umgebungen mit mehreren Monitoren werden vollständig unterstützt.
   Hintergründe pausieren automatisch während des Spielens, damit die Leistung deines Computers nicht sinkt.
   Erstelle deine eigenen animierten Hintergründe im Wallpaper Engine-Editor.
   Animiere neue Live-Hintergründe durch das Importieren von einfachen Bildern, HTML- oder Video-Dateien für den Hintergrund.
   Nutze den Steam Workshop kostenlos um Hintergründe zu teilen und herunterzuladen.
   Wallpaper Engine kann gleichzeitig mit anderen Steam-Spielen oder Anwendungen genutzt werden.
   Unterstützte Video-Formate: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (für lokale Dateien, Workshop unterstützt nur mp4).
   Nutze die kostenlose Begleit-App für Android und nimm deine Lieblingshintergründe unterwegs mit.
   Unterstützung für Razer Chroma und Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine liefert einen unterhaltsamen Desktop und nutzt dabei so wenig System-Ressourcen wie möglich. Du kannst die Anwendung so einstellen, dass sie Hintergründe automatisch pausiert oder vollständig stoppt, während eine andere Anwendung im Vollbildmodus ausgeführt wird (inklusive randlosen Fenstermodus), damit du nicht während des Spielens oder Arbeitens abgelenkt oder behindert wirst. Eine große Anzahl an Optionen zur Anpassung der Qualität und Leistung erlauben es dir, Wallpaper Engine perfekt an deinen Computer anzupassen. Als Grundsatz gilt, dass 3D-, 2D- und Video-Hintergründe am besten ausgeführt werden, während Web- und Anwendungsbasierte Hintergründe mehr System-Ressourcen benötigen. Eine dedizierte GPU wird empfohlen, ist aber nicht erforderlich.     Wähle aus über einer Millionen kostenlosen Hintergründen aus dem Steam Workshop, darüber hinaus werden jeden Tag unzählige neue Hintergründe hochgeladen! Du kannst keinen Hintergrund finden, welcher deinem Geschmack entspricht? Entfalte deine Kreativität mit dem Wallpaper Engine-Editor um deine eigenen animierten Hintergründe aus Bildern, Videos, Websites oder Anwendungen zu erstellen. Eine große Auswahl an Vorkonfigurationen und Effekten erlauben es dir, Hintergründen aus eigenen Bildern zu erstellen und diese im Workshop zu teilen oder diese nur für dich selbst zu nutzen.

O Wallpaper Engine permite-lhe usar wallpapers animados no seu ambiente de trabalho do Windows. Vários tipos de wallpapers animados são suportados, incluindo animações em 3D e 2D, websites, vídeos e até mesmo certas aplicações. Escolha um wallpaper já existente ou crie o seu próprio e partilhe-o no Steam Workshop! Além disso, pode utilizar a aplicação complementar gratuita do Wallpaper Engine para Android para transferir os seus wallpapers favoritos para o seu dispositivo móvel Android e levar os seus wallpapers animados para toda a parte.
 
  NEW:  Utilize a aplicação complementar gratuita para Android para transferir os seus wallpapers favoritos para o seu dispositivo móvel Android.
 
  
 
   Dê vida ao seu ambiente de trabalho com gráficos, vídeos, aplicações ou websites em tempo real.
   Use wallpapers animados enquanto está afastado do seu computador.
   Personalize wallpapers animados com as suas cores favoritas.
   Use wallpapers interativos que podem ser controlados com o rato.
   Compatível com muitas proporções de ecrã e resoluções nativas, incluindo 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Pode ser usado em sistemas com vários monitores em simultâneo.
   Os wallpapers são pausados enquanto joga para melhorar o desempenho.
   Crie os seus próprios wallpapers animados no Wallpaper Engine Editor.
   Anime novos wallpapers a partir de imagens básicas, ou importe ficheiros HTML ou de vídeo para o wallpaper.
   Utilize o Steam Workshop para partilhar e transferir wallpapers gratuitamente.
   O Wallpaper Engine pode ser utilizado simultaneamente com qualquer outro jogo ou aplicação do Steam.
   Formatos de vídeo suportados: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (para ficheiros locais, Workshop só permite mp4).
   Utilize a aplicação complementar gratuita para Android para levar os seus wallpapers de cena e vídeo favoritos para qualquer lugar.
   Suporte para Razer Chroma e Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    O Wallpaper Engine tem como objetivo oferecer uma experiência divertida usando o mínimo possível de recursos do sistema. Pode optar por pausar ou parar por completo o wallpaper automaticamente enquanto usa outra aplicação ou joga em ecrã completo (incluindo o modo de janela sem margens) para que o wallpaper não seja uma distração ou inconveniência enquanto estiver a jogar ou a trabalhar. Muitas opções de ajuste da qualidade e do desempenho permitem que o Wallpaper Engine se adapte perfeitamente ao seu computador. Como regra geral, os wallpapers em 3D, 2D e baseados em vídeo terão um melhor desempenho, ao passo que websites e aplicações necessitarão de mais recursos do seu sistema. Ter uma GPU dedicada é altamente recomendado, mas não obrigatório.     Escolha entre mais de um milhão de wallpapers gratuitos do Steam Workshop, com novos wallpapers adicionados todos os dias! Não encontra nenhum wallpaper adequado ao seu humor? Dê asas à sua imaginação utilizando o Wallpaper Engine Editor para criar os seus próprios wallpapers animados a partir de imagens, vídeos, websites ou aplicações. Uma grande variedade de predefinições e efeitos permitem que anime as suas próprias imagens e as partilhe no Steam Workshop ou as use apenas para si próprio.

Wallpaper Engineを使えば、Windowsのデスクトップにライブ壁紙の設定ができるようになります。3Dならびに2Dアニメーション、ウェブサイト、動画ならびに特定のアプリケーションなど、さまざまなタイプの動く壁紙がサポートされています。さらに、すでにお持ちの壁紙、または自分で作成した壁紙をSteamワークショップで共有することも可能です！また、Wallpaper EngineのAndroid用無料コンパニオンアプリを使えば、お気に入りの壁紙をAndroidモバイルデバイスに転送することができ、どこでもライブ壁紙を楽しむことが可能になります。
 
  【新機能】  Android用無料コンパニオンアプリを使用して、お気に入りの壁紙をAndroidモバイルデバイスに転送することが可能に。 
 
  
 
   リアルタイムグラフィック、ビデオ、アプリケーションまたはウェブサイトを使用し、デスクトップの壁紙に命を吹き込もう。
   PC未使用時、動くスクリーンセーバーを表示。
   動く壁紙をお気に入りの色でカスタマイズ。
   マウスで操作可能なインタラクティブ壁紙。
   16:9/21:9/16:10/4:3などの幅広いアスペクト比とネイティブ解像度をサポート。
   マルチモニター環境対応済み。
   パフォーマンス向上を図るため、ゲームプレイ中、壁紙は一時的に停止。
   Wallpaper Engineエディタで自分だけの動く壁紙を作成。
   一般的な画像に動く要素を追加。または壁紙に使用するHTMLあるいは動画ファイルをインポート。
   Steamワークショップでは壁紙の共有と無料ダウンロードが可能。
   Wallpaper Engineは他のSteamのゲームまたはアプリケーションと同時起動が可能。
   mp4/WebM/avi/m4v/mov/wmvなどの動画ファイル形式をサポート（ローカルファイルの場合、ワークショップでサポートされるのはmp4のみ)。
   Android用無料コンパニオンアプリを使用して、お気に入りのシーンや動く壁紙を自由に持ち歩くことが可能。
   Razer ChromaならびにCorsair iCUEをサポート  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engineは使用するシステムリソースを最小限に抑えつつ、エンターテイメント性の高い体験の提供を目指しています。Wallpaper Engineではゲームプレイや作業の妨げにならないよう、他アプリケーション使用時や全画面表示時または仮想フルスクリーン利用時においては、壁紙を自動的に一時停止または完全に停止させることが可能です。また、性能やパフォーマンスを調整できる機能が多く用意されており、Wallpaper Engineとお使いのPCとの互換性を高めやすい環境が整っています。基本的に3D、2Dならびに動画ベースの壁紙のパフォーマンスが最も高く、ウェブサイトやアプリケーションを利用する際には多くのシステムリソースが必要になります。必須ではありませんが、専用GPUを準備されることを推奨します。     Steamワークショップには日々新しい壁紙がアップロードされ、100万を超える中から好きな壁紙を無料で選ぶことができます。お気に入りの壁紙が見つからない場合でも心配無用。Wallpaper Engineエディタを使って想像力を大いに働かせてみてください。画像、動画、ウェブサイトまたはアプリケーションを利用し、動く要素が追加された壁紙を作成することが可能です。多種多様なプリセットやエフェクトを使って自分だけの動く壁紙を作ってみてください。作成した壁紙は自分で使用するのも結構ですが、Steamワークショップで共有することも可能です。

Wallpaper Engine enables you to use live wallpapers on your Windows desktop. Various types of animated wallpapers are supported, including 3D and 2D animations, websites, videos and even certain applications. Choose an existing wallpaper or create your own and share it on the Steam Workshop! In addition to that, you can use the free Wallpaper Engine companion app for Android to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device and take your live wallpapers on the go.
 
  NEW:  Use the free Android companion app to transfer your favorite wallpapers to your Android mobile device.
 
  
 
   Bring your desktop wallpapers alive with realtime graphics, videos, applications or websites.
   Use animated screensavers while you are away from your computer.
   Personalize animated wallpapers with your favorite colors.
   Use interactive wallpapers that can be controlled with your mouse.
   Many aspect ratios and native resolutions supported including 16:9, 21:9, 16:10, 4:3.
   Multi monitor environments are supported.
   Wallpapers will pause while playing games to save performance.
   Create your own animated wallpapers in the Wallpaper Engine Editor.
   Animate new live wallpapers from basic images or import HTML or video files for the wallpaper.
   Use the Steam Workshop to share and download wallpapers for free.
   Wallpaper Engine can be used at the same time as any other Steam game or application.
   Supported video formats: mp4, WebM, avi, m4v, mov, wmv (for local files, Workshop only allows mp4).
   Use the free Android companion app to take your favorite scene and video wallpapers on the go.
   Support for Razer Chroma and Corsair iCUE.  
  
 
    Wallpaper Engine aims to deliver an entertaining experience while using as few system resources as possible. You can choose to automatically pause or completely stop the wallpaper while using another application or playing fullscreen (including borderless windowed mode) to not distract or hinder you while playing a game or working. Many options to tweak quality and performance allow you to make Wallpaper Engine fit your computer perfectly. As a general rule of thumb, 3D, 2D and video based wallpapers will perform best, while websites and applications will require more resources from your system. Having a dedicated GPU is highly recommended, but not required.     Choose from over a million free wallpapers from the Steam Workshop with new wallpapers being uploaded every day! Can't find a wallpaper that fits your mood? Let your imagination go wild by using the Wallpaper Engine Editor to create your own animated wallpapers from images, videos, websites or applications. A large selection of presets and effects allow you to animate your own images and share them on the Steam Workshop or to just use them for yourself.
